title: DatasheetExtraction
description: Top-level per-MPN extraction file. One file per part in datasheets/extracted/<MPN>.json. Composes base + zero-or-more category extensions.

categories.description: Per-category schema versions, keyed by category name. E.g. {'regulator': '0.3', 'mcu': '1.0'}.

family_ref.description: Path to a family file in datasheets/extracted/_families/ when this MPN is a variant. Reserved for v1.5 Tier 2 dedup; always null in v1.4.

extractor_scout.description: Identifier of the scout subagent / model that produced the orchestration plan. Opaque string (tier mapping lives in .kicad-happy.json).

extractor_schema_version.description: Version of the overall extraction pipeline that produced this file. Independent of base/category schema versions.

quality_score.description: Overall quality score 0–100. Populated by datasheet_score.py after extraction.

plan_ref.description: Relative path to the orchestration plan JSON (datasheets/extracted/<MPN>.plan.json).

categories.description: List of active category extensions for this MPN (e.g. ['regulator'] or ['regulator', 'supervisor'] for a PMIC). Each entry must match a sibling key carrying that category's extension payload.
